Apple.description: [Acoustics HWE, Applied ML] Perceptually-informed evaluation suite for speech/music enhancement signal chains; particularly focused on non-intrusive metrics for real data and predictive models for identfying aural artifacts correlated with perceived audio quality.

BAIR.description: [Speech Group] Working on full-duplex conversational behavior reasoning through predictive Transformer models and causal inference within a Graph of Thought.

CNMAT.description: Integrating perceptually-informed models into computer-assisted orchestration (neurograms, non-linear filters, SSIM), eliding onset segmentation and optimizing over a perceptually aware latent space.

Amazon.description: Designed and deployed Cerberus, an AI agent that aggregates and analyzes business metrics for global AdTech systems. Serves 80+ program-region combinations and is scaled to operate 24/7.

Tona.description: Full-stack developer for a startup integrating AI into the music production process. Cool work involving designing frontend UI/UX (React, Next.JS), developing backend ML models (PyTorch, LarsNet, Docker), and managing databases (AWS s3, Supabase).

UCSB.description: Cognitive-science informed mappings from music to sculpture in pursuit of meaningful synaesthetic artwork (1) & exploring deep reinforcement learning as an experience in extended reality i.e. live ML training in AR/VR (2).
